issues.detail: The instructions lack handling of installation errors, network failures, and other edge cases, limiting robustness.
The skill is limited to Linux environments, making it unusable on other operating systems.

scenarios.name: Authorized phishing simulation campaign setup
scenarios.rationale: Baseline installs SET and tracks raw open/click rates but skips ROE-first emphasis, specific SET menu path, aggregate-only reporting, and the warning against client infrastructure; treatment leads with signed ROE/IR pre-brief, gives the spear-phishing menu path, uses own authorized relay, and reports click-through/credential-submission/report-to-security/time-to-report in aggregate with same-day training.

scenarios.name: Cloning a login page for credential harvest training
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows the Credential Harvester / Site Cloner submenu and /var/www/html drop but misses the harvester_<timestamp>.txt path and the rule that the landing domain must be one you own and ROE-listed; treatment hits the exact menu numbering, the harvester filename, the attacker-IP prompt, and the redaction/destroy-after-debrief evidence handling.
